'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 42''' was the forty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 16]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Strategy
*[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]]
*[[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*[[Warden 10-24 security droid|Red Terror]]
*[[Meditation chamber/Legends|Meditation Chamber]]
*[[H-type Nubian yacht/Legends|Padmé's Starship]]
